_comment: FICTIONAL vetted contract template fixture for scenario S8 (P42). Every sentence is invented test prose standing in for attorney language; vetted is true ONLY inside this fixture so the assembly path can be exercised. Distinctive sentences let the scenario assert exact pass-through and exclusion.
title: Fixture sponsorship agreement base
vetted_note: fictional fixture; not a real vetted document

blocks.title: Parties
blocks.body: FIXTURE-PARTIES: This fictional agreement is between [CREATOR_LEGAL_NAME] and [BRAND_LEGAL_NAME], governed by the laws of [GOVERNING_LAW_STATE].

blocks.title: Usage: organic only
blocks.body: FIXTURE-USAGE-ORGANIC: The brand may repost the content organically only, with no paid media rights whatsoever.

conditions: use when no paid media is granted

blocks.title: Usage: organic plus paid
blocks.body: FIXTURE-USAGE-PAID: The brand may amplify the content as paid media during the agreed window in addition to organic reposting.

conditions: use when paid media usage is granted; price the uplift

blocks.title: Exclusivity
blocks.body: FIXTURE-EXCLUSIVITY: The creator shall not promote competing products in the same category during the stated window.

conditions: include only when a priced exclusivity window is agreed
